hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.ts) pnpm exec eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && [ -f "$f" ] && case "$f" in *.ts|*.json) npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; }

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; output=$(pnpm run build 2>&1 && pnpm test --reporter=dot 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output" | tail -20 | python3 -c "import sys,json; content=sys.stdin.read(); print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'Stop','additionalContext':'Build/test gate failed. Fix before continuing:\n'+content}}))"; exit 2; fi

hooks.prompt: Review the conversation. Check: (1) Were all tasks the user requested actually addressed? (2) If code was modified, were tests run? (3) Are there uncommitted changes that should be committed? If everything looks complete, respond {"ok": true}. If something was missed, respond {"ok": false, "reason": "<what remains>"}.
